failure-mode.description: No cache layer — every repeat phrase pays full inference cost; bill 3-5× expected.
failure-mode.detector: cache.enabled==false OR no Redis/Memcached layer in front of provider
failure-mode.repair: Add SHA256(text+voice+model) cache; TTL ≥7d. Expect 40-70% hit rate.

failure-mode.description: Voice cloning without consent — legal / ethical violation. EU AI Act flags as high-risk.
failure-mode.detector: voice.clone_consent==false but voice id refers to a cloned voice; OR consent-record file missing
failure-mode.repair: Block deployment; require signed consent record before voice id is usable.

failure-mode.description: Real-time agent on tts-1 — observed TTFB 800ms breaks conversational UX.
failure-mode.detector: use_case in {voice-agent, IVR} AND provider==openai AND model in {tts-1, tts-1-hd}
failure-mode.repair: Switch to Deepgram Aura (≈200ms) or ElevenLabs Turbo (≈400ms).

failure-mode.description: Hard-coded single provider — outage takes voice feature down.
failure-mode.repair: Wire fallback to a different provider or local Coqui XTTS.

failure-mode.description: Long text not chunked — 5000-char input synthesized as one call; provider truncates or returns 500.
failure-mode.detector: input length > provider per-call cap (OpenAI: 4096, ElevenLabs: 5000) AND not chunked
failure-mode.repair: Chunk by sentence; synthesize each, concatenate. Use `templates/chunk-text.py`.
